characters_found.name: hadji_murad
direct_quotes: My murid. Eldar is his name.
Very well. Now we must send a man with a letter to the Russians. My murid will go but he will need a guide.
Canst thou conduct my murid to the Russians?
speech_descriptors: immediately asked (without wasting a single word)
actions: Introduces Eldar to the old man as his murid
Listens absently to the old man, looking at the door and listening to sounds outside
Listens with attention and nods approvingly when Sado speaks
After Sado finishes, proposes sending a letter to the Russians via his murid
Greets Bata upon his arrival
Asks Bata without delay whether he can guide his murid to the Russians
inner_states: Distracted and vigilant — listening to sounds outside rather than the old man's story
Alert to external threats (Shamil's order to seize him)
Approves of Sado's report; quickly pivots to action (sending letter to Russians)
social_markers: Commander figure — others defer to him
Economical with words — no small talk, purely functional speech
Has murids (followers), indicating religious/military leadership status
Strategic thinker — immediately plans contact with Russians upon hearing Shamil's threat

relationship_dynamics.quality: commander to loyal murid; introduces him authoritatively
kunak (guest-friend); listens attentively, approves of his counsel
polite guest; listens but is mentally elsewhere
direct and businesslike; wastes no words in assigning him a task

new_info: Plans to send a letter to the Russians — first concrete strategic action shown
His murid (Eldar) is designated as the messenger to the Russians
He needs a local guide (Bata) for this mission, indicating unfamiliarity with the terrain or danger of traveling alone

characters_found.name: eldar
actions: Enters the saklya as Hadji Murad's murid (newcomer)
Sits down on felt beside Hadji Murad after being motioned by the old man
Sits cross-legged, fixing his eyes on the old man who is speaking
inner_states: Attentive — fixes his 'fine ram-like eyes' on the old man; watchful presence
social_markers: Murid (follower/disciple) of Hadji Murad
Young, physically striking (fine ram-like eyes)
Silent and obedient — takes assigned seat without a word

relationship_dynamics.quality: devoted murid; completely deferential, follows instructions implicitly
respectful newcomer; sits where directed and listens

new_info: Formally named and introduced for the first time: 'Eldar is his name'
Designated by Hadji Murad as the messenger who will carry the letter to the Russians

characters_found.name: sado
direct_quotes: In my house, no one shall injure my kunak while I live, but how will it be in the open fields?...We must think it over.
speech_descriptors: he added, turning to his son
actions: Enters the saklya (steps heard under penthouse before he enters)
Takes off wooden slippers at the door
Pushes old worn cap to back of head
Squats down in front of Hadji Murad
Lifts palms upward, repeats a prayer, strokes face downward before speaking
Reports Shamil's order to seize Hadji Murad alive or dead
Reports that Shamil's envoys left the day before
Warns that the people fear to disobey Shamil
Declares his house safe for Hadji Murad as kunak but expresses concern for open fields
Volunteers his brother Bata as a guide
Directs his son to fetch Bata
inner_states: Loyal to kunak-obligation — emphatic that no one shall harm Hadji Murad under his roof
Pragmatically worried about safety beyond his house — 'We must think it over'
Acts with deliberate ritual (prayer before speaking), suggesting gravity of the situation
social_markers: Chechen village host, about forty years old
Small beard, long nose, black eyes
Head unshaved so long it is beginning to regrow black hair — modest/rural appearance
Follows Chechen hospitality ritual (prayer before speech)
Has a brother (Bata) and a fifteen-year-old son
Kunak relationship with Hadji Murad — strong honor obligation

relationship_dynamics.quality: kunak — deeply loyal host; pledges protection within his home
father gives direct commands; son obeys instantly
brother; trusts him to guide Eldar to the Russians

new_info: Has received news of Shamil's order to seize Hadji Murad alive or dead
Shamil's envoys departed only the day before — urgency is high
Volunteers Bata (his brother) as guide for the mission to the Russians
